PCR: Set up {Samples} PCR reactions using PrimeSTAR protocol PG3K55 on Thermocycler 2A. Prepare the following total master mix volumes (includes 10% buffer): {ddH2O} uL ddH2O, {PrimeSTAR_dNTP_Mixture_2p5mM} uL dNTPs, {primer1} uL forward primer, {primer2} uL reverse primer, {template} uL template, {PrimeSTAR_GXL_Buffer_5x} uL 5x buffer, {PrimeSTAR_GXL_DNA_Polymerase} uL polymerase. Aliquot 50 uL per reaction. Never let the enzyme warm up.
Ligate: Set up {Samples} ligation reactions on Thermocycler 1A using program main/LIGATE. Prepare the following total master mix volumes (includes 10% buffer): {ddH2O} uL ddH2O, {T4_DNA_Ligase_Buffer_10x} uL 10x T4 buffer, {dna} uL DNA, {T4_DNA_ligase} uL T4 ligase. Aliquot 10 uL per reaction. Never let enzymes warm up.
Gibson: Set up {Samples} Gibson Assembly reactions. Prepare the following total master mix volumes (includes 10% buffer): {ddH2O} uL ddH2O, {Gibson_Assembly_Master_Mix} uL Gibson Assembly Master Mix. Aliquot 20 uL per reaction. Never let enzymes warm up.
